ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike usage record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the bike usage */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was used */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season (1=Spring, 2=Summer, 3=Fall, 4=Winter) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a holiday (0=No, 1=Yes) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if it's a working day (0=No, 1=Yes) */,
  "weather" INTEGER /* Weather condition (1=Clear, 2=Mist, 3=Light Snow, 4=Heavy Rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual_users" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered_users" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "total_users" INTEGER /* Total number of users */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the month */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., start, end) */,
  "user_age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "user_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_workingday FOREIGN KEY ("workingday") REFERENCES working_days ("workingday_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_weather FOREIGN KEY ("weather") REFERENCES weather ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_usage_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the station (e.g., latitude, longitude) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes it can hold) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "district" TEXT /* District where the station is located */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator managing the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., casual, registered) */,
  "membership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "maintenance_count" INTEGER /* Number of maintenance activities performed on the bike */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the bike (for electric bikes) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike rented */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the bike was rented from */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the rental */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the rental */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the rental */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User rating for the rental experience */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if a discount was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Celsius */,
  "feels_like" REAL /* Feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., Clear, Mist, Light Snow, Heavy Rain) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "working_days" (
  "workingday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each working day */,
  "workingday_date" TEXT /* Date of the working day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workingday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Month when the season starts */,
  "end_month" INTEGER /* Month when the season ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)
